title: Mountain Bike Hydraulic Disc Brakes,MTB Hydraulic Brakes Front（Right） 800mm/Rear（Left） 1450mm For Bicycle/Road/Gravel/Kids/BMX/Push Bike hydraulic brake.
features: Excellent braking performance：Bicycle hydraulic disc brake is an upgrade kit for the mechanical disc brake system,3D cylinder designcan provide a larger Braking effect in a shorter distance, And it has excellent thermal insulation,Whether it is flat, rough, muddy roads, or difficult weather, it has excellent braking performance.

Dual-Piston Driving：Each hydraulic brake caliper has 2 pistons,Dual-Piston to drive friction disc on both sides at the same time, strong braking force, Smooth、quick brake, timely reset.Hydraulic disc brakes of e-bikes use mineral oil fluid(came preinstalled), the hose is pre-coated with environmentally friendly mineral oil and can be used directly without refueling.With split clamping ring for easy installation.

Hydraulic brake lever Integrated design : Hydraulic brake lever is an integrated cylinder structure, which is durable and has no oil leakage, and the three-finger brake lever can stop your bike immediately by simply squeezing it, and the brake is sensitive.

Installation: Right hand front hydraulic brake: Hose length: approx. 800 mm ；Left hand rear hydraulic brake: Housing wire length: approx. 1450 mm ；The best way to mount your discs：F160 / R140 or F180 / R160 ， Hydraulic brakes with adapter,Can be mounted on the IS/PM frame.

Reminder: Please remove the caliper protection sheet before installation. Do not use the brake lever without protection, otherwise the tubing oil leakage or may burst.If you have any questions, please let us know and we will give you a satisfactory answer.

He wants to design own bike accessories style, E.g bike sticker, tape, fender, bottle cage, grip, etc；In 21 years, we have designed lots of products that satisfy customers.
